title: xanthophyllum colubrinum
intro: Xanthophyllum colubrinum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum colubrinum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and wounds, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal teas and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
